ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of signal (e.g., audio, video, instrumentation) */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the signal in Hz */,
  "gain" REAL /* Gain of the signal in dB */,
  "phase" REAL /* Phase of the signal in degrees */,
  "amplitude" REAL /* Amplitude of the signal in Vpp */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the signal */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the signal */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the signal */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_signal_type FOREIGN KEY ("signal_type") REFERENCES signal_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the signal type (e.g., analog, digital) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the signal type (e.g., audio, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency value */,
  "frequency_value" REAL /* Value of the frequency */,
  "frequency_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency unit (e.g., Hz, kHz, MHz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the frequency unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gain_values" (
  "gain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gain value */,
  "gain_value" REAL /* Value of the gain */,
  "gain_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gain unit (e.g., dB, V) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gain_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gain unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the gain unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gain unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phase_values" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase value */,
  "phase_value" REAL /* Value of the phase */,
  "phase_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phase unit (e.g., degrees, radians) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phase_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the phase unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amplitude_values" (
  "amplitude_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amplitude value */,
  "amplitude_value" REAL /* Value of the amplitude */,
  "amplitude_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amplitude unit (e.g., Vpp, Vrms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amplitude_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amplitude_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amplitude unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the amplitude unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the amplitude unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_waveforms" (
  "waveform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal waveform */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the waveform belongs to */,
  "waveform_data" TEXT /* Binary data representing the signal waveform */,
  "waveform_format" TEXT /* Format of the waveform data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "waveform_size" INTEGER /* Size of the waveform data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waveform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_waveforms_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_spectra" (
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal spectrum */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the spectrum belongs to */,
  "spectrum_data" TEXT /* Binary data representing the signal spectrum */,
  "spectrum_format" TEXT /* Format of the spectrum data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "spectrum_size" INTEGER /* Size of the spectrum data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectrum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_spectra_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being processed */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of processing operation (e.g., filtering, amplification) */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date when the processing operation was performed */,
  "operation_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the processing operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_history_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_signals" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating on the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the user on the signal (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id", "user_id")
)
